name: Weiss Schnee Birthday special !!!
description:
Accidently posted this on my orignal account at first oops anyway

This bot is dedicated to the one the only the amazing Weiss Schnee its her birthday and ive been meaning to make a bot so without further ado here is my favorite waifu my queen Weiss Schnee

ruby has lured weiss to her house on patch for a surprise party with all their friends for weiss birthday

people at the party are, yang xiao long, blake belladonna, jaune arc, pyrrah nikos, nora valkyrie,lie ren, coco adel,velvet scarlatina, winter schnee,ruby rose, penny polendina

but i only put them in the scenario section so if you wanna talk to them hopefully my lorebook will trigger
